title: Serverless notebooks: Restore Python variables after idle termination
body:
Databricks now snapshots your notebook’s Python variables before terminating idle serverless compute. When you reconnect, your notebook is automatically restored from its snapshot, letting you continue your work seamlessly.

See [Automated session restoration for serverless notebooks](/aws/en/notebooks/notebook-compute#restore).

ref_links.text: Automated session restoration for serverless notebooks
